completed_tasks.name: Zero technical debt (TODOs/placeholders)
completed_tasks.progress: All 8 sub-plans complete. Integration test fixes in progress: CRUD tests fixed (5/5 pass), framework fixture renamed, multi-app config fixed, isolate_id_oom_test fixed, http_routing_test fixed.

remaining_tasks.name: Run full integration test suite and verify 0 failures
Address hanging adversarial/cpu_timeout tests if needed

blockers.description: Some adversarial tests (adversarial_cpu, adversarial_*) and cpu_timeout tests hang during execution
blockers.workaround: These are pre-existing E2E tests that spawn actual server processes. Run them individually with long timeouts or investigate separately.

blockers.description: cargo test --tests times out after 5 minutes
blockers.workaround: Run tests in smaller batches with --test flags

human_actions_pending.action: Verify full integration test suite passes in batches
human_actions_pending.context: Library tests are 670/670. Integration tests need batch verification.

decisions.decision: V8 snapshot loading IS supported via StartupData::from(vec) + CreateParams::snapshot_blob()
decisions.rationale: Previous 'not supported' claim was wrong. rusty_v8 v147 fully supports it.

decisions.decision: Tests must use dynamic UUID tokens to prevent hard-coded placeholder responses from passing
decisions.rationale: Caught multiple tests passing only because they asserted against static strings

decisions.decision: auto_cache module defines JsHandlerSource locally rather than importing from router
decisions.rationale: Router type didn't exist; auto_cache is self-contained

decisions.decision: CRUD tests must not assume state persists across requests
decisions.rationale: Runtime resets V8 context between requests by design for isolation. Rewrote multi-request tests as single-request.

decisions.decision: Config limits enforce TigerStyle bounds (timeout <= 30s, memory <= 256MB)
decisions.rationale: Test configs updated to respect limits

next_action: Run remaining integration test batches (adversarial, cpu_timeout, security) and fix any failures. Then update STATE.md.
context_notes: Phase 37 TigerStyle Architecture implementation is complete. All 8 sub-plans (37-01 through 37-08) are done. The current work is fixing integration tests that broke due to fundamental changes: (1) VFS no longer used for test JS entrypoints - runtime reads from disk via std::fs::read_to_string, (2) WinterCG renamed to WinterTC, (3) Config limits now enforced. Most integration tests have been fixed and pass. Need to verify remaining test batches and update documentation.
